creator: colin-ports@heliocat.net
text:
Created attachment 176293
Port update

Diff contains the following changes:
Makefile: Version bump, maintainer email adjustment
distinfo: contents update
pkg-plist: .so version updates, relocation of s6-setuidgid and s6-applyuidgid

Notable changes between 2.2.4.3 and 2.4.0.0:
  s6-svscan defaults to -t0 instead of -t5000
  s6-ipcserver-socketbinder can now create datagram sockets
  s6-applyuidgid and s6-setuidgid moved from $PREFIX/sbin to $PREFIX/bin

As always, update notes can be found at:
http://www.skarnet.org/software/s6/upgrade.html
